title: Bentgo Kids' 14.25" School Backpack - Rainbows and Butterflies
description: EASY TO CARRY: This lightweight and durable backpack is perfect for kids ages 4 and up with its comfortable, adjustable padded straps, easy-grip handle, and kid-friendly extended zipper pulls to open and close with ease. Made with premium, non-toxic fabric, it comes in a ton of unique prints and colors your kid will love. Plus, the water-resistant material helps to repel any leaks or spills—making it easy to clean! PLENTY OF SPACE: The roomy main compartment can fit a laptop, tablet, 3-ring binder, notebooks, and more in its spacious design. Plus, the two outer zippered compartments are perfect for holding smaller items, like pens, rulers, and even snacks for preschool, kindergarten, and elementary school. Add 2 Bentgo Water Bottles to the side mesh pockets, or pack a pair of Bentgo Ute.
